Reviews Contact

Client Reviews

4.7/5 average rating from 6+ happy clients

What Our Clients Say

Real feedback from homeowners and businesses who trust Virginia Home Repair to get the job done right.

“Virginia Home Repair did an amazing job with our kitchen cabinets! They helped us design custom cabinets that perfectly fit our space and style. The quality of the workmanship is outstanding, and the installation was seamless. We couldn't be happier!”

Sarah M. Custom Cabinets
Mar 15, 2025

“Our deck was in rough shape after the winter, but Virginia Home Repair brought it back to life. They replaced several damaged boards and reinforced the railings. The work was done quickly and efficiently, and the price was very reasonable. I would definitely recommend them.”

David K. Deck Repair
Nov 20, 2024

“We recently had Virginia Home Repair install a new front door, and we're thrilled with the results. The door is beautiful and secure, and the installation was flawless. The team was professional and courteous throughout the entire process. Thanks!”

Emily R. Door Installation
Sep 1, 2024

“Virginia Home Repair replaced all the windows in our house, and we've already noticed a difference in our energy bills. The new windows are energy-efficient and look great. The installation team was efficient and cleaned up everything afterwards. Highly recommend!”

John L. Window Replacement
Jul 10, 2024

“We hired Virginia Home Repair for the framing on our home addition. They did an excellent job, ensuring that everything was square, plumb, and structurally sound. The team was professional and communicative throughout the project.”

Jessica T. Framing Services
May 2, 2024

“Virginia Home Repair added beautiful trim and molding to our living room, and it completely transformed the space. The craftsmanship is impeccable, and the attention to detail is impressive. We're so happy with the results!”

Michael B. Trim and Molding
Feb 18, 2024
Virginia Home Repair

Trusted carpenter professionals serving Virginia Beach, VA and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
